title: bridelia micrantha
intro: Bridelia micrantha, also known as the small-fruit bridelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bridelia micrantha include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Bridelia micrantha can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, making it a valuable herbal remedy in many cultures.
